stream.en: A clear stream runs through the forest.
stream.zh: 一條清澈的小溪流過森林。

stretch.en: Stretch your arms before you exercise.

strict.en: Our teacher is strict but fair.
strict.zh: 我們老師很嚴格但公平。

strike.en: The workers went on strike for better pay.
strike.zh: 工人為了更好的薪水而罷工。

struggle.en: She struggled to lift the heavy bag.
struggle.zh: 她吃力地提起那個重袋子。

style.en: I like her style of dressing.

subway-underground-metro.en: We took the subway to the museum.

succeed.en: If you keep trying, you will succeed.
succeed.zh: 只要持續努力，你就會成功。

such.en: I have never seen such a big dog.
such.zh: 我從沒見過這麼大的狗。

sudden.en: There was a sudden change in the weather.

suggest.en: She suggested going to the park.

suit.en: He wore a black suit to the meeting.
suit.zh: 他穿著黑色西裝去開會。

suitable.en: This movie is suitable for children.
suitable.zh: 這部電影適合兒童觀看。

super.en: We had a super time at the beach.
super.zh: 我們在海灘玩得超開心。

supper.en: We had soup and bread for supper.

supply.en: The store has a good supply of water.
supply.zh: 這家店有充足的水供應。

support.zh: 我的家人支持我的夢想。

surf.en: They went to the beach to surf.

surface.en: The surface of the table is smooth.

survive.en: The plant can survive without much water.
survive.zh: 這株植物不需要太多水就能存活。

swallow.en: Chew your food before you swallow.
swallow.zh: 吞下去之前要先咀嚼食物。

sweater.en: She put on a warm sweater.
sweater.zh: 她穿上一件溫暖的毛衣。

sweep.en: He swept the floor with a broom.

swim.en: We swim in the pool every summer.
swim.zh: 我們每年夏天在泳池游泳。

swimsuit.en: Don't forget your swimsuit for the trip.

swing.en: The child sat on the swing.

symbol.en: The dove is a symbol of peace.

system.en: Our school has a new computer system.
system.zh: 我們學校有新的電腦系統。

tale.en: Grandma told us a fairy tale.
tale.zh: 奶奶跟我們講了一個童話故事。

target.en: The arrow hit the center of the target.

task.en: Cleaning the room was an easy task.
task.zh: 打掃房間是個簡單的任務。

tax.en: People pay tax to the government.

teapot.en: She poured tea from the teapot.

tear.en: He tore the paper into small pieces.

technology.zh: 科技改變了我們的生活。

teens.en: Many teens enjoy playing video games.
teens.zh: 許多青少年喜歡打電玩。

term.en: We have exams at the end of the term.

terrorism.en: Countries work together to fight terrorism.
terrorism.zh: 各國合作對抗恐怖主義。

terrorist.zh: 警方逮捕了那名恐怖分子。

text.en: Read the text and answer the questions.

textbook.en: Open your textbook to page ten.

therefore.en: It was raining; therefore, we stayed home.
therefore.zh: 在下雨，所以我們待在家。

thirsty.en: After running, I felt very thirsty.

thought.en: She shared her thoughts about the book.
thought.zh: 她分享了她對這本書的想法。

thunder.en: We heard thunder during the storm.
thunder.zh: 暴風雨時我們聽到了雷聲。

thus.en: He studied hard; thus, he passed.
thus.zh: 他努力讀書，因此他通過了。

till.en: Wait here till I come back.

tiny.en: A tiny ant climbed up the wall.

tire.en: The car has a flat tire.
tire.zh: 這輛車有個輪胎沒氣了。

tissue.en: She wiped her nose with a tissue.

title.en: What is the title of the book?

toast.en: I had toast and eggs for breakfast.

tone.en: She spoke in a gentle tone.

tongue.en: The hot soup burned my tongue.

toothache.en: I went to the dentist with a toothache.

tour.en: We took a tour of the old city.

track.en: The runners ran around the track.

trade.en: The two countries trade with each other.
trade.zh: 這兩個國家彼此進行貿易。

tradition.en: Eating dumplings is a family tradition.
tradition.zh: 吃水餃是我們家的傳統。

trap.en: The mouse was caught in a trap.

trash.en: Throw the trash in the bin.

travel.en: They love to travel during summer.

treasure.en: The pirates searched for buried treasure.

trial.en: The man waited for his trial in court.
trial.zh: 那名男子在法庭等待審判。

trick.en: The magician showed us a clever trick.
trick.zh: 魔術師給我們看了一個巧妙的把戲。

true.en: Is the story true or made up?
true.zh: 這個故事是真的還是編的？

trust.en: I trust my best friend completely.
trust.zh: 我完全信任我最好的朋友。

tube.en: She squeezed paste from the tube.
tube.zh: 她從管子裡擠出膏狀物。

turtle.en: The turtle slowly crossed the road.

typical.en: This is a typical day at school.

ugly.en: The duckling thought it was ugly.
ugly.zh: 那隻小鴨覺得自己很醜。

umbrella.en: Take an umbrella; it might rain.

unit.en: We finished the first unit of the book.
unit.zh: 我們讀完了這本書的第一單元。

universe.en: There are countless stars in the universe.
universe.zh: 宇宙中有數不清的星星。

university.en: He hopes to enter a good university.
university.zh: 他希望進入一所好大學。

unless.en: We won't go unless it stops raining.
unless.zh: 除非雨停了，否則我們不會去。

upload.en: She uploaded the photos to her computer.

upon.en: The cat sat upon the warm roof.

upper.en: Her office is on the upper floor.

upset.en: She was upset about losing the game.
upset.zh: 她為了輸掉比賽而難過。

used.en: He bought a used car at a low price.
used.zh: 他用低價買了一輛二手車。

user.en: The app has millions of users.
user.zh: 這個應用程式有數百萬名使用者。

vacation.en: We are going to the beach for our vacation.

valley.en: A river flows through the green valley.
valley.zh: 一條河流過綠色的山谷。

view.en: The view from the top is amazing.
view.zh: 從頂端看的景色很驚人。

village.en: She grew up in a small village.

vote.en: Citizens vote to choose their leaders.
vote.zh: 公民投票選出他們的領袖。

waist.en: The belt fits around my waist.
waist.zh: 這條皮帶剛好繞我的腰。

waiter-waitress.en: The waiter brought us the menu.
waiter-waitress.zh: 服務生把菜單拿給我們。

wallet.en: He keeps cash in his wallet.

war.en: Many people suffered during the war.

watermelon.en: We ate cold watermelon in summer.
watermelon.zh: 夏天我們吃冰涼的西瓜。

wedding.en: We were invited to their wedding.
wedding.zh: 我們受邀參加他們的婚禮。

weekday.en: She works on weekdays and rests on weekends.

weigh.en: Please weigh the fruit on the scale.
weigh.zh: 請用秤量一下水果的重量。

western.en: We watched a western movie last night.
western.zh: 我們昨晚看了一部西部電影。

whale.en: The whale is the largest animal in the sea.
whale.zh: 鯨魚是海裡最大的動物。

whatever.en: You can eat whatever you like.

wheel.en: One wheel of the bike is broken.
wheel.zh: 腳踏車的一個輪子壞了。

whenever.en: Call me whenever you need help.
whenever.zh: 你需要幫忙時隨時打給我。

wherever.en: I will follow you wherever you go.

whisper.en: She whispered a secret in my ear.
whisper.zh: 她在我耳邊低聲說了個秘密。

whoever.en: Whoever finishes first wins a prize.
whoever.zh: 誰先完成誰就贏得獎品。

whole.en: He ate the whole pizza by himself.
whole.zh: 他一個人吃完了整個披薩。

whom.en: The man whom you met is my uncle.
whom.zh: 你見過的那個人是我叔叔。

width.en: The width of the door is one meter.
width.zh: 這扇門的寬度是一公尺。

willing.en: She is willing to help anyone.

windy.en: It is too windy to fly a kite.
windy.zh: 風太大了不適合放風箏。

wine.en: Adults drank wine at the dinner.

wire.en: Birds sat on the telephone wire.

wolf.en: A wolf howled in the dark forest.
wolf.zh: 一隻狼在黑暗的森林裡嚎叫。

wonder.en: I wonder what time it is.

wood.en: The table is made of wood.

wooden.en: She has a wooden toy box.
wooden.zh: 她有一個木製的玩具箱。

wool.en: The sweater is made of wool.

workbook.en: Do the exercises in your workbook.

worse.zh: 他的感冒一夜之間變嚴重了。

worst.en: That was the worst movie I've ever seen.
worst.zh: 那是我看過最糟的電影。

worth.en: This old book is worth a lot of money.

wound.en: The nurse cleaned the wound carefully.

yam.en: Yams are sweet and full of fiber.

youth.en: He was a fast runner in his youth.

zebra.en: A zebra has black and white stripes.
